title: Chad Rankings
type: Catchphrase , Parody , Participatory Media , Pop Culture Reference , Viral Debate
about: Chad Rankings refers to a fictional ranking system in which prominent looksmaxxers are ranked against each other according to various metrics, usually concerning facial aesthetics, physique and PSL score, to determine which Chad reigns supreme. Chad Rankings are often arbitrarily assigned in slang overload captions posts chronicalling conflicts in the ongoing Mog wars, or World War Mog. Efforts have recently been made to legitimize Chad Rankings through standardized metrics.
origin: The Chad Rankings meme's origins can be traced back to a popular catchphrase within the looksmaxxing community, referencing a fictional study: "Harvard's #1 Ranked Chad" or "Harvard University's #1 Ranked Chad," a title that is attached to figures in the so-called "Looksmaxxing-Verse," mostly arbitrarily. According to Official Chad Rankings [1] , a website dedicated to weekly-updated Chad rankings, the emphasis of academic authority is used as a punchline. The haphazard assignment of the title #1 Ranked Chad has led to many discrepancies, making true categorization difficult. This lack of concrete information, coupled with its intentional vagueness and lack of true context, further lends to the absurdity of the joke, facilitating its spread.
